narrative: Pre-trip 2026-05-21 04:50, run 4501. Last DVIR flagged left front brake — repair not completed. Brake system: air leak failure 9 psi/min single (exceeds 3 psi/min OOS threshold) — Out-Of-Service. Low-air warning never illuminated until 42 psi; warning failure is OOS criterion. Steer tire 3/32 — below 4/32 OOS. Right rear lug nut broken/loose — OOS. Cargo securement failure: load shifted, straps frayed — OOS. Driver attempting to dispatch anyway. CVSA criteria triggered: vehicle is out-of-service.
